product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I'm really impressed with the features it offers. I was wondering if there is any possibility of negotiating the price? Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message:
Hey! Great to hear you're interested in the C3 – it's an incredible TV with that OLED evo panel and 4K 120Hz. I'd definitely be open to working with you on price.

What kind of budget were you thinking? The retail is $1,799, but depending on your situation, I might have some flexibility. Let me know what you had in mind and we can see what we can do!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your willingness to work on the price. My budget is $1100.00. Can we work within that range to make a deal happen?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message:
I appreciate you being upfront about your budget. Here's the thing – at $1,100, that's actually my absolute bottom line cost on this unit, so there's no room for me to move there.

However, I can offer you the TV at $1,299, which is still a solid $500 off retail. That gives you an amazing premium OLED TV at a real discount while I can make this work. Does that price point work better for you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the offer, but unfortunately, $1,299 is above my budget of $1100. I'll have to pass on this offer. Thank you for considering though.
